Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: chelsea whelan, esq., law office of michael heath, 415.931.4207, for defendants chandrakant shah and shah enterprises, inc; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs CHANDRAKANT SHAH, SHAH ENTERPRISES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with fifteen days leave to amend to allege ultimate facts to support the alter ego allegations. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
